---
title: "Quarto revealjs slides"
---

A Quarto website project with revealjs slides, auto-deployed via GitHub Actions.

- Online version: [yourusername.github.io/repo-name](https://yourusername.github.io/repo-name)
- Source code: [github.com/yourusername/repo-name](https://github.com/yourusername/repo-name)
